body_txt: A Living MacGuffin sought after for some supernatural ability or quality they have. Searching for the Apocalypse Maiden or Barrier Maiden is common, or perhaps they have some other power that would be useful, such as curing a disease. Characters who are sought after due to their status go under Hostage MacGuffin . Characters with some mundane trait (beauty, intelligence, etc) that makes them a target go under Mundane MacGuffin Person , while ones who were originally literally objects go under MacGuffin Turned Human . Females may cross over with Phlebotinum Girl . Often a Person of Mass Destruction . If the character is captured before the story starts or at some point in said story, it can qualify for Captured Super-Entity . See also Unicorn Hunting , where Unicorns are sought after for their blood, hair, horns, and magic.
